title: Session 8: Limits of Sine and Cosine
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview When we tried to differentiate the sine and cosine functions we were left with two limits to calculate. In this session Professor Jerison calculates these limits, taking a close look at the unit circle and applying some fundamental ideas from linear approximation.
Lecture Video and Notes Video Excerpts Clip 1: Limit of sin(x)/x
Clip 2: Limit of (1-cos(x))/x
Clip 3: Questions and Answers
Clip 4: Derivative of sin(x), Geometric Proof
Worked Example The Function sinc(x)
